requirement_topic.en: Uzenergo / Uzbekistan Grid-Connection Requirements for BESS and PCS
requirement_topic.zh: BESS和PCS的Uzenergo / 乌兹别克斯坦并网要求
requirement_topic.zht: BESS和PCS的Uzenergo / 烏茲別克斯坦併網要求

summary.en: BESS projects connecting to Uzbekistan's national or regional power system must satisfy the applicable network owner, National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / Uzenergo where transmission or system-operator review is involved, and Uzbekistan electricity-sector rules for the PCS, protection, metering, dispatch communication, power quality, operating modes, and commissioning. Requirements vary by voltage level, connection point, project size, market role, and whether the storage asset is paired with generation or load.
summary.zh: 接入乌兹别克斯坦国家或区域电力系统的BESS项目须满足适用电网业主要求；涉及输电网或系统运营方审查时，还须满足乌兹别克斯坦国家电网/Uzenergo以及乌兹别克斯坦电力行业规则对PCS、保护、计量、调度通信、电能质量、运行模式和调试的要求。要求随电压等级、接入点、项目规模、市场角色以及储能是否与发电或负荷配套而变化。
summary.zht: 接入烏茲別克斯坦國家或區域電力系統的BESS項目須滿足適用電網業主要求；涉及輸電網或系統營運方審查時，還須滿足烏茲別克斯坦國家電網/Uzenergo以及烏茲別克斯坦電力行業規則對PCS、保護、計量、調度通信、電能品質、運行模式和調試的要求。要求隨電壓等級、接入點、項目規模、市場角色以及儲能是否與發電或負荷配套而變化。

standards_or_laws: National Electric Grid of Uzbekistan / Uzenergo technical conditions where applicable
Regional energy company connection requirements for distribution-level projects
Uzbekistan electricity grid and system-operation rules
Project-specific dispatch, protection, metering, telemetry, and commissioning requirements

summary.en: China commonly uses GB/T 34120-2023 for electrochemical storage PCS technical requirements, GB/T 36558-2023 for system-level grid-connected ESS requirements, NB/T 42090-2016 for electrochemical energy storage PCS, and State Grid or China Southern Power Grid enterprise rules. These Chinese grid documents do not substitute for Uzbekistan network-owner or Uzenergo review.
summary.zh: 中国通常采用GB/T 34120-2023作为电化学储能PCS技术要求，GB/T 36558-2023作为并网储能系统级要求，NB/T 42090-2016作为电化学储能PCS参考，并适用国家电网或南方电网企业规则。这些中国并网文件不能替代乌兹别克斯坦电网业主或Uzenergo审查。
summary.zht: 中國通常採用GB/T 34120-2023作為電化學儲能PCS技術要求，GB/T 36558-2023作為併網儲能系統級要求，NB/T 42090-2016作為電化學儲能PCS參考，並適用國家電網或南方電網企業規則。這些中國併網文件不能替代烏茲別克斯坦電網業主或Uzenergo審查。

standards_or_laws: State Grid / China Southern Power Grid project rules

gap.en: Chinese PCS type-test reports must be translated into Uzbekistan grid settings and local protection philosophy. Exporters should prepare relay settings, frequency and voltage ride-through data, anti-islanding data, reactive-power and power-factor capability, dispatch communication protocol evidence, metering design, single-line diagrams, model files where requested, and commissioning procedures for the Uzbekistan project owner and network review. Internationally-financed projects may additionally require lender independent-engineer review against IEC-based grid and storage specifications.
gap.zh: 中国PCS型式试验报告须转换为乌兹别克斯坦电网参数和当地保护原则。出口商应准备继电保护定值、频率和电压穿越数据、防孤岛数据、无功和功率因数能力、调度通信协议证据、计量设计、单线图、需要时的模型文件和调试程序，供乌兹别克斯坦项目业主及电网审查。国际融资项目还可能要求出借方独立工程师按IEC并网和储能规范进行额外审查。
gap.zht: 中國PCS型式試驗報告須轉換為烏茲別克斯坦電網參數和當地保護原則。出口商應準備繼電保護定值、頻率和電壓穿越數據、防孤島數據、無功和功率因數能力、調度通信協議證據、計量設計、單線圖、需要時的模型文件和調試程序，供烏茲別克斯坦項目業主及電網審查。國際融資項目還可能要求出借方獨立工程師按IEC併網和儲能規範進行額外審查。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory for grid connection and energisation where Uzbekistan network-owner, Uzenergo, regional energy-company, or electricity-sector approval applies
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory for Chinese grid connection where State Grid / Southern Grid project requirements apply

source.publisher: Government Portal of the Republic of Uzbekistan

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Chinese GB/T 34120, GB/T 36558, or NB/T 42090 evidence does not itself clear Uzbekistan grid connection. Local network-owner and, where applicable, Uzenergo or regional energy-company review must be addressed before energisation.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 中国GB/T 34120、GB/T 36558或NB/T 42090证据本身不能完成乌兹别克斯坦并网。送电前须处理当地电网业主及适用时Uzenergo或区域能源公司的审查要求。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 中國GB/T 34120、GB/T 36558或NB/T 42090證據本身不能完成烏茲別克斯坦併網。送電前須處理當地電網業主及適用時Uzenergo或區域能源公司的審查要求。
